arts.ttl: 'Really sad' - how Manchester United are trying to help Mason Mount
arts.sum: Mason Mount is on the sidelines again with the seventh injury of his Man United career 18 months on from joining the club.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals Alejandro Garnacho is 'upset' with him over Manchester United omission
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho was dropped from the Man United squad for the first time by Ruben Amorim for the Manchester derby.

arts.ttl: Botman, Udogie, Mazraoui: The early FPL Gameweek 17 team news
arts.sum: Before the press conferences, we round up the early team news The post Botman, Udogie, Mazraoui: The early FPL Gameweek 17 team news appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Alejandro Garnacho update and 'strong interest' in PSG star
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is facing a busy January transfer window as he looks to bolster his Manchester United squad for the season ahead after an up-and-down start to his reign, while dealing with the future of Marcus Rashford

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Mikel Arteta urged to sign Marcus Rashford as Gunners eye France star
arts.sum: Arsenal's lack of firepower this season and need for reliable striker who can provide goals has been highlighted countless times, and Mikel Arteta will be hoping the club back him in January to boost their titles hopes

arts.ttl: How Man United and Marcus Rashford can avoid a messy divorce and why we shouldn't be surprised at the timing of his interview, writes CHRIS WHEELER
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: A smile for the cameras, a wave to a friendly Portuguese reporter he recognised at the back of the room, and then straight down to business.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy hints Man Utd have made major mistake in Ruben Amorim overhaul
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy was forced out at Manchester United by Ruben Amorim but has landed on his feet at Leicester and is grateful to have been joined by another ex-United coach

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford transfer: Ruben Amorim airs frustration before Tottenham Hotspur vs. Manchester United EFL cup clash
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim airs his frustration at Marcus Rashford's comments regarding his future with at Old Trafford, but also praises the forward before facing Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals plan for Marcus Rashford talks over Manchester United future: 'Hard to explain'
arts.sum: Amorim would have preferred Rashford to speak with him rather than the media

arts.ttl: Three Teams Should Sign Manchester United's Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Manchester United's Marcus Rashford could be available and there are a number of teams in the Premier League and abroad that should consider signing him.
